title: Paw Patrol, Skye’s Helicopter, Toy Vehicle with Collectible Action Figure, Sustainably Minded Kids’ Toys for Boys & Girls Aged 3 and Up
features: COLLECTIBLE SKYE FIGURE: This helicopter includes a collectible Skye toy figure. Wearing her signature pilot’s uniform, Skye is ready to save the day

PAW PATROL TOY HELICOPTER: Clip Skye into the cockpit of her toy helicopter, which features authentic detailing, working wheels and a movable propeller, before racing off on a thrilling rescue mission
SUSTAINABLY MINDED TOY: Skye and her PAW Patrol toy helicopter are made from at least 65% pre-consumer recycled plastic. Kids can explore their imagination, creating missions with their favourite pup
COLLECT THEM ALL: For more fun, collect all of the PAW Patrol toys, like the Air Rescue kids’ toys, PAW Patrol film toys, dragon toys, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets (each sold separately)
LEARNING AND EDUCATION TOYS: PAW plush toys and toy cars are toys for girls and boys who enjoy building toys and gifts for kids 3 and up, as an alternative to dolls, dinosaur toys or a train set
description: From the brand Paw Patrol Join the brave puppies on their adventures! Previous page Fire Rescue Visit the store Rescue Wheels Visit the store Air Rescue Visit the store Jungle Pups Visit the store Playsets & Vehicles Visit the store Pup Squad Visit the store Cuddly plush Visit the store Fun & Exciting Games Visit the store Next page
